case_title: FIGONI, LARRY VS FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FIGONI, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT REQUEAST FOR CONTINUANCE SEND PAPER TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-05-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-11-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIGONI, LARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $69.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,069.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-01-2000, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIGONI, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
